## Recipe Submission

Thank you for contributing a new recipe! Please ensure:

- [ ] Recipe YAML file is in `public/recipes/` directory
- [ ] File name follows format: `recipe-name-YYYYMMDD.yml`
- [ ] Recipe ID matches file name (without `.yml`)
- [ ] All required fields are filled:
  - `id`
  - `name`
  - `source` (with appropriate fields for type)
  - `ingredients` (at least one)
  - `portions`
  - `times` (preparation, cooking)
  - `categories` (at least one)
  - `dateAdded`
  - `dateModified`
- [ ] YAML syntax is valid
- [ ] Ingredient names match existing database when possible (for accurate seasonality)

### Recipe Details

**Recipe Name:** 

**Categories:** 

**Tags:** 

**Brief Description:** 

---

The validation workflow will automatically check your recipe for proper YAML syntax and duplicate IDs.
